title: Kontigo Care - AI-Powered Addiction Treatment Platform
problem: Addiction treatment is resource-intensive, often lacks continuous monitoring, and has high relapse rates. Traditional treatment doesn't scale.
solution: AI-powered eHealth platform (Previct®) for addiction treatment. Provides continuous digital support, monitoring, and personalized interventions.
technology: AI, eHealth platform, continuous monitoring, predictive analytics
target_customer: Addiction treatment centers, healthcare systems, municipalities
traction_signals: Return to growth with rising profitability (Q3 2025)
regulatory_notes: CE marking as medical device. Operates within Swedish addiction treatment framework.
varden_fit: LOW-MODERATE - Specialized clinical tool for addiction. Not infrastructure play. Could potentially integrate as specialty module but limited overlap with Varden's primary care focus. Interesting for AI-driven behavior change approach.
notes: Public company - financials available. Niche focus on addiction but interesting AI behavior change model. Research: clinical outcomes, market size in Nordics.
